nodes.label: Subscription should be remove after completed event
Event kinds gave_up / crashed / timed_out send a notification but DO     NOT del
After the first blocked, should receive second blocked notification.
Notifier watcher path must not invoke `_kb.init_db` (issue #21378).
Each gateway keeps its watcher on, but only the subscribing profile claims.
The gateway for the profile that created/subscribed the task reports it.
`/kanban --board <slug> create ...` must subscribe on that board.      The gatew
When a completed event carries ``artifacts`` in its payload, the     notifier up
Missing artifact paths are silently skipped — they may have been     referenced
